location_name: Los Tres Mex Grill East Lansing
review_text: We visited this Mexican restaurant last week and were pretty disappointed. The food was just okay — I had a burrito, which was decent but nothing special. What really brought the experience down was the cleanliness and service. The place didn’t feel very clean, and the service was downright unpleasant. The woman who served us looked visibly angry the entire time, never made eye contact, sighed constantly, and acted like we were bothering her just by being there. When we asked for a receipt, she handed it to us with the same glove she had just been using to handle another customer’s food. That was honestly pretty gross. I feel bad for the other customers too. Overall, I won’t be coming back.
owner_response: Thank you for sharing your experience, Sarah. We appreciate your feedback and take it seriously. Cleanliness and service are top priorities for us, and it's clear we fell short during your visit. We will address these concerns with our team to ensure a better atmosphere for everyone. Your input is valuable in helping us improve. Please contact us at promotions@L3amigos.com to discuss this further.
